{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Green (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can surround his body in a bubble of Green.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
